findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-001 could not be evaluated for omg-ambient-unavailable/ambient-unavailable: authorization.effective unavailable: Gateway API waypoint evidence unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Apply an AuthorizationPolicy that selects this workload and inspect the resolution chain to confirm its effective scope.
